AI Continent.summary: Supports deployment and adoption of trustworthy AI across Europe, including access to AI infrastructures, testing and experimentation facilities, sectoral uptake, and alignment with EU AI policy and standards.

Accelerating the Best Use of Technology.summary: Targets faster uptake of advanced digital technologies (AI, data, cloud/edge, HPC, cybersecurity) by public administrations and industry through pilots, interoperable solutions, and scalable deployment projects.

Accelerating the Best Use of Technologie.summary: Targets faster uptake of advanced digital technologies (AI, data, cloud/edge, HPC, cybersecurity) by public administrations and industry through pilots, interoperable solutions, and scalable deployment projects.

EDIH AI Continent.summary: Strengthens and expands the European Digital Innovation Hubs (EDIH) network to help SMEs and public sector organisations test, adopt and scale AI solutions, including skills, mentoring, and access to ecosystems.

Advanced Digital Skills.summary: Funds specialised training, curricula and talent pipelines for advanced digital skills (AI, cybersecurity, HPC, data, quantum), including short courses, masters, and upskilling/reskilling initiatives.

Programme Support Actions.summary: Covers coordination, outreach, monitoring, evaluation and standardisation actions that enable effective programme implementation, stakeholder engagement and policy feedback loops.

CyberHUBs Capacity Building.summary: Builds capacity for cybersecurity competence hubs and ecosystems (incl. Cybersecurity Competence Community), improving coordination, skills, services and cross-border collaboration for resilience.
